2606.26987.title: Where Do Models Find Happiness? Emotion Vectors in Open-Source LLMs
2606.26987.paper_summary: Recent work identified emotion vectors in Claude Sonnet 4.5, which are internal representations that encode emotion concepts, causally influence behavior, and exhibit geometry mirroring human psychological structure. We test the generality of these findings in two open-weight models, Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509 and Gemma-4-E4B-it, extracting emotion contrast vectors across all layers, using two model-generated corpora. We recover valence geometry for both models, with peak PC1--valence correlations of $r = 0.76$ and $r = 0.83$, approaching the $r = 0.81$ reported for Claude.Beyond replication, we observe notable differences in how valence representations emerge across model depth. In Gemma-4-E4B-it, valence is strongly encoded in early layers but collapses towards later layers, whereas Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509 exhibits the opposite pattern, with valence representations absent in early layers, but emerging at mid depths. Arousal encoding, in contrast, is sensitive to the extraction corpus: both models show stronger PC2--arousal alignment with Gemma-generated stories ($r$ up to $0.45$) than Apertus-generated ones ($r \leq 0.21$), suggesting arousal-relevant cues are unevenly distributed across generated corpora. We open-source our experiment code and dataset for reproducible investigation of emotion representations across language model architectures.
2606.26987.paper_summary_zh: 最近的研究在Claude Sonnet 4.5中識別出情感向量，這些是編碼情感概念的內部表徵，會因果影響行為，並展現出與人類心理結構相似的幾何形狀。<lb/>我們在兩個開放權重模型中測試這些發現的普遍性，Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509和Gemma-4-E4B-it，通過使用兩個模型生成的語料庫提取所有層次的情感對比向量。<lb/>我們為這兩個模型恢復了效價幾何，峰值PC1--效價相關性為$r = 0.76$和$r = 0.83$，接近Claude報告的$r = 0.81$。<lb/>除了重複之外，我們觀察到效價表徵在模型深度中的出現有顯著差異。<lb/>在Gemma-4-E4B-it中，效價在早期層次中強烈編碼，但在後期層次中崩潰，而Apertus-8B-Instruct-2509則顯示出相反的模式，早期層次中缺乏效價表徵，但在中層深度中出現。<lb/>相比之下，喚醒編碼對提取語料庫敏感：兩個模型在Gemma生成的故事中顯示出更強的PC2--喚醒對齊（$r$高達$0.45$），而在Apertus生成的故事中則為$r \leq 0.21$，這表明與喚醒相關的線索在生成的語料庫中分佈不均。<lb/>我們開源了實驗代碼和數據集，以便對情感表徵在語言模型架構中的可重複性研究。
2606.26987.author: Sinie van der Ben et.al.
2606.26987.authors: Sinie van der Ben, Raphaël Baur, Yannick Metz, Mennatallah El-Assady
